summary: Effect-system decomp and metadata PR: renamed efSpecial to efAlt, added efdata.c/efdata.h for ef static data, adjusted ef splits and symbols, improved or matched efSync/efAsync items, and applied descriptive names across many efLib/efAsync symbols. Bot report showed 9 new matches, 2 unmatched-item improvements, and one efasync .data regression attributed by the author to jumptable-related work.

key_files.role: Large efAsync source update; PR body claims efAsync_Spawn now matches, .sdata now matches, and efAsync_Dispatch has a slightly better match.
evidence_refs: pr_body: efasync.c efAsync_Spawn now matches; efasync.c .sdata now matches; efAsync_Dispatch slightly better match
bot_report: efAsync_Spawn 99.88% to 100.00%; efAsync .sdata 95.24% to 100.00%; efAsync_Dispatch 98.46% to 98.60%; efasync .data regression 65.93% to 24.82%

key_files.role: efSync source update; PR body claims .sdata now matches and efSync_Spawn has a slightly better match.
evidence_refs: pr_body: efsync.c .sdata now matches; efSync_Spawn slightly better match

key_files.role: New efAlt implementation replacing efSpecial naming/split for the same 0x80061D70 text range.
evidence_refs: diff: splits.txt melee/ef/efspecial.c changed to melee/ef/efalt.c
diff: symbols.txt efSpecial_SpawnSpecial renamed to efAlt_Spawn at .text:0x80061D70

key_files.role: Removed old efSpecial source as part of efSpecial -> efAlt rename/split change.
New ef static-data holder replacing eflib_alloc split ownership for selected bss/sbss data.
evidence_refs: pr_body: efdata.c New file that holds static data for ef, moved from eflib_alloc and other data regions
diff: splits.txt melee/ef/eflib_alloc.c changed to melee/ef/efdata.c and .sbss start 0x804D64E8 end 0x804D64F4 added

key_files.role: Large efLib source update aligned with descriptive ef-related symbol names and data ownership changes.
evidence_refs: pr_body: Gave descriptive naming to ef-related functions
diff: symbols.txt many efLib_8005xxxx/fn_8005xxxx symbols renamed to efLib_Init, efLib_Create, efLib_Cb_* and related names

key_files.role: Header updates corresponding to efLib symbol/signature naming work.
Effect type definition updates supporting ef source changes.
Split ownership update for efdata, efAlt, efSync .sdata, and efAsync .sdata ranges.
evidence_refs: diff: eflib_alloc.c split renamed to efdata.c; efspecial.c split renamed to efalt.c; efsync .sdata end adjusted 0x804D39D8 to 0x804D39D5; efasync .sdata end adjusted 0x804D3A00 to 0x804D39FA

key_files.role: Symbol metadata and naming updates for efLib, efAlt, efAsync, efdata-owned data, bss/sbss, and jumptable labels.
evidence_refs: diff: efLib_8005xxxx/fn_8005xxxx symbols renamed to descriptive efLib_* names
diff: efAsync_80063930 and related symbols renamed to efAsync_Dispatch, efAsync_LoadAsync, efAsync_OnLoad, efAsync_LoadSync, efAsync_Queue*
diff: efLib_LoadKind, efLib_EffectCount, efLib_AnimCount sbss symbols introduced

key_files.role: Build object list updated from eflib_alloc.c to efdata.c and efspecial.c to efalt.c.
evidence_refs: diff: Matching object melee/ef/eflib_alloc.c changed to melee/ef/efdata.c; melee/ef/efspecial.c changed to melee/ef/efalt.c

key_files.role: Added float and long pi/tau-style math macros used by touched code or future matching.
evidence_refs: diff: added M_PI_F, M_PI_2_F, M_PI_3_F, M_PI_L, M_TAU_L, M_PI_2_L, M_PI_3_L

key_files.role: Small reference/include/prototype or callsite updates across db, fighter, game-mode, ground, item, lb, vi, gobj, and particle files.
evidence_refs: changed_files: src/melee/db/dballoc.c; src/melee/ft/chara/ftCommon/ftCo_Guard.c; src/melee/ft/chara/ftKirby/ftKb_SpecialN.c; src/melee/ft/fighter.c; src/melee/ft/ftdata.c; src/melee/ft/ftdemo.c; src/melee/ft/ftlib.c; src/melee/gm/gm_16AE.c; src/melee/gm/gm_1832.c; src/melee/gm/gmregtyfall.c; src/melee/gm/gmstaffroll.c; src/melee/gr/grlib.c; src/melee/it/item.c; src/melee/lb/lbdvd.c; src/melee/vi/vi0102.c; src/melee/vi/vi0401.c; src/melee/vi/vi0402.c; src/melee/vi/vi0501.c; src/melee/vi/vi0502.c; src/melee/vi/vi0601.c; src/melee/vi/vi0801.c; src/melee/vi/vi1201v1.c; src/melee/vi/vi1202.c; src/sysdolphin/baselib/gobj.h; src/sysdolphin/baselib/particle.c; src/sysdolphin/baselib/particle.h

what_changed: Renamed the efSpecial unit to efAlt in source, headers, configure.py, splits.txt, and symbols.txt.
Added efdata.c and efdata.h to hold static ef data that the PR body says was moved from eflib_alloc and other data regions.
Removed efspecial.c/efspecial.h and eflib_alloc.h content from the changed file set; eflib_alloc.c lost a small amount of source.
Adjusted GALE01 split ranges for efdata .bss/.sbss, eflib .sbss removal, efsync .sdata, efalt, and efasync .sdata.
Renamed many efLib and efAsync symbols from address-style names to descriptive names such as efLib_Init, efLib_Create, efLib_Cb_*, efAsync_Dispatch, efAsync_LoadAsync, and efAsync_Queue*.
Bot report recorded new matches for efAlt_Spawn, efAlt data sections, efdata .bss/.sbss, efsync .sdata, efAsync_Spawn, and efasync .sdata.
Bot report recorded improvements for unmatched efSync_Spawn and efAsync_Dispatch, and a regression for unmatched efasync .data.
Added MSL math macros for float and long pi-derived constants.

Touched many downstream files with small one-to-five-line changes, likely to follow renamed ef symbols or header/prototype changes; the slice does not include enough diff to classify each small callsite edit precisely.

smart_moves.text: The PR paired source-unit renames with configure.py, splits.txt, and symbols.txt updates, avoiding a source-only rename that would leave build/split metadata stale.
Data ownership was made explicit by introducing efdata.c and reflecting its .bss/.sbss ownership in splits.txt instead of leaving static ef data under eflib_alloc.
evidence_refs: pr_body: efdata.c New file that holds static data for ef

smart_moves.text: Descriptive ef symbol names were applied broadly enough to include symbol metadata and likely callsite/header updates, which improves searchability while preserving addresses in symbols.txt.
evidence_refs: pr_body: Gave descriptive naming to ef-related functions
diff: symbols.txt efLib_* and efAsync_* rename block
changed_files: multiple small downstream callsite/header files

decomp_lessons.lesson: When a decomp PR renames or re-splits a translation unit, update source files, configure object entries, split ranges, and symbol names together so validation reports describe moved ownership rather than unexplained broken matches.
evidence_refs: bot_report: broken efSpecial/eflib_alloc matches correspond to new efAlt/efdata matches

decomp_lessons.lesson: Small data-section range corrections can convert section matches even when text functions remain unmatched; in this PR, efsync .sdata and efasync .sdata reached 100% while efSync_Spawn and efAsync_Dispatch were still only improved.
evidence_refs: pr_body: efsync.c .sdata now matches; efasync.c .sdata now matches
bot_report: efSync_Spawn 98.28%; efAsync_Dispatch 98.60%; efsync .sdata and efasync .sdata 100%

decomp_lessons.lesson: Jumptable-associated data regressions may appear while the owning dispatch function is still unmatched; treat the regression as requiring follow-up evidence rather than assuming it is final cleanup.
evidence_refs: author_comment: this is jumptable related, it will be inherently fixed once the associated function matches i believe

naming_conventions.text: The PR uses efAlt_* for the renamed alternative effect unit, replacing efSpecial_* at the same text/data range.
The PR changes many efLib address-style functions to verb/action names with efLib_ prefix, including Init, SetFlags, Destroy, Create, CreateGenerator, SpawnParticleEffect, and SetParam* forms.
evidence_refs: diff: symbols.txt efLib_8005B4B8 -> efLib_Init and related rename block

naming_conventions.text: Callback-like efLib names use an efLib_Cb_ prefix in this PR, e.g. efLib_Cb_SPtcl, efLib_Cb_ParticleRender, and efLib_Cb_SetOffsetY_FromParamY.

efAsync queue/load functions are named by operation, including efAsync_Dispatch, efAsync_LoadAsync, efAsync_OnLoad, efAsync_LoadSync, efAsync_QueueProcessDeferred, efAsync_QueueFlush, efAsync_QueueClear, and efAsync_QueueInit.
evidence_refs: diff: symbols.txt efAsync_80063930 and related symbols renamed

naming_conventions.text: The author explicitly stated they were not attached to the descriptive ef names, so these names should be treated as PR-applied names rather than externally proven canonical semantics.
evidence_refs: pr_body: Feel free to change any of these, I am not attached to them

assembly_or_matching_tactics.text: Use split and symbol metadata changes to move section ownership when static data belongs in a new unit; here efdata.c receives ef .bss/.sbss ranges and corresponding symbols.
evidence_refs: pr_body: efdata.c holds static data for ef

assembly_or_matching_tactics.text: For unit renames, expect validation to show old-unit broken matches paired with new-unit matches; compare the byte totals and ranges before treating them as real regressions.
evidence_refs: bot_report: efSpecial_SpawnSpecial -7104 broken and efAlt_Spawn +7104 new match
bot_report: eflib_alloc .bss -44 broken and efdata .bss +44 new match

assembly_or_matching_tactics.text: Jumptable data should be tracked with its owning function; author indicated a displayed issue was jumptable-related and likely tied to the associated function reaching match.
evidence_refs: author_comment: jumptable related; inherently fixed once associated function matches
diff: symbols.txt jumptable_803BF9F8 and jumptable_803BFB28 metadata near efAlt/efAsync data

review_feedback.text: GALE01 report showed matched code +656 bytes, total data -13 bytes, matched data +27 bytes, 9 new matches, 6 broken matches, 2 unmatched improvements, and 1 unmatched regression.
Author responded that a reported image/issue was jumptable-related and believed it would be fixed once the associated function matches.
No review comments or formal reviewer feedback were present in the loaded slice.

follow_up_queries: PR 2339 efAsync .data regression jumptable associated function matches
efLib descriptive symbol names author not attached

evidence_refs: human_pr_text: PR body and author issue comment
raw_diff: truncated diff excerpt with splits/symbols/configure/math changes
text_corpus.jsonl: bot report and author comment
notes: The diff file is truncated in loaded_files, so detailed code-level tactics inside efasync.c, efsync.c, eflib.c, and efalt.c were not fully inspected.
The bot validation report provides useful match/regression evidence, but no build command, objdiff command, or reviewer approval details are present in the slice.
There are no review comments; reviewer intent and acceptance rationale are not available.
The author's jumptable explanation is phrased as belief and should not be promoted as a proven fix path without later function-match evidence.
Many small downstream files changed, but the loaded diff excerpt does not show their exact edits; they are recorded as touched files rather than individually interpreted.

accepted_candidate_records.title: Unit rename or split moves should update source, configure, split, and symbol metadata together
accepted_candidate_records.text: PR 2339 shows efSpecial->efAlt and eflib_alloc->efdata changes made across source files, configure.py, GALE01 splits, and symbols. The bot report then reflects paired old-unit broken matches and new-unit matches rather than an isolated source rename.
evidence_refs: bot_report: efSpecial/efAlt and eflib_alloc/efdata paired results

accepted_candidate_records.title: Treat jumptable data regressions as tied to the owning dispatch match unless later evidence proves otherwise
accepted_candidate_records.text: In PR 2339, efasync .data regressed while efAsync_Dispatch only improved; the author identified the issue as jumptable-related and expected it to be fixed when the associated function matches. This is a follow-up heuristic, not proof of correctness.
evidence_refs: bot_report: efasync .data regression and efAsync_Dispatch improvement

source_update_candidates.title: efSpecial unit renamed to efAlt in PR 2339
source_update_candidates.text: PR 2339 changed the effect split/source naming from melee/ef/efspecial.c to melee/ef/efalt.c and renamed efSpecial_SpawnSpecial to efAlt_Spawn at .text:0x80061D70.
source_update_candidates.reason: Possible path-history fact for future searches; curator should verify against current tree before adding.

source_update_candidates.title: efdata.c introduced for ef static data ownership
source_update_candidates.text: PR 2339 introduced efdata.c/efdata.h and moved ef static data ownership from eflib_alloc and other data regions, with efdata.c receiving .bss 0x80458EB0-0x80458EDC and .sbss 0x804D64E8-0x804D64F4 in the shown split excerpt.
evidence_refs: pr_body: efdata.c New file that holds static data for ef
source_update_candidates.reason: Potential source/path ownership note; should be verified against final current splits before becoming a path fact.

source_update_candidates.title: efLib and efAsync descriptive symbol names from PR 2339
source_update_candidates.text: PR 2339 renamed many efLib and efAsync symbols from address-style names to descriptive names. The author noted they were not attached to the names, so these should be curated cautiously as historical PR-applied names rather than independently proven canonical semantics.
evidence_refs: pr_body: Gave descriptive naming to ef-related functions; Feel free to change any of these
diff: symbols.txt efLib and efAsync rename blocks
source_update_candidates.reason: May help symbol history/search, but author caveat means curator should avoid treating each semantic name as proven.

source_update_candidates.title: Do not overinterpret PR author beliefs about jumptable regressions
source_update_candidates.text: A PR author may identify a data regression as jumptable-related and likely fixed by matching the associated function. Record this as a follow-up hypothesis until later objdiff/checkdiff evidence confirms the function and data relationship.
evidence_refs: author_comment: jumptable related; fixed once associated function matches i believe
source_update_candidates.reason: Possible refinement to verification/regression guidance; current standards already require evidence for claimed matches, so curator may decide this is redundant.

rejection_notes: Do not promote the added efLib/efAsync descriptive names as globally canonical semantics solely from this slice; the author explicitly invited changing them.
Do not claim efAsync_Dispatch or efSync_Spawn matched; the bot report only shows improvements to 98.60% and 98.28%.
Do not claim the efasync .data regression was fixed in this PR; the loaded report shows a regression and only an author hypothesis about jumptables.
Do not infer exact edits for the many small downstream files because their diff hunks are not loaded in detail.
